description.en-US:
Source-available open fork of YouTube Transcript Copy. See <https://github.com/stone-w4tch3r/open-youtube-transcript-copy> Adds a convenient "Copy Transcript" button directly to YouTube video pages, making it easy to extract and copy video transcripts for research, note-taking, or content creation.

The extension enhances this core function with user-configurable settings, such as including the video title, adding timestamps, or formatting the transcript into a single paragraph. All features directly serve the primary purpose of easily extracting and formatting video transcripts for the user's own use.

summary.en-US: One-click YouTube transcript copying with configurable formatting options.
